boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: All policy requirements satisfied: END-IRI-089 confirms contractor=Iris Installers, site=Site 4Q, coverage=umbrella liability, date=2026-06-28, status=currently bound CE-12 effective before work begins. No exact source defect remains open before execution.

boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing: 2026-06-28. Scope: Site 4Q. Authority: CE-12 bound endorsement. Dependency: insurance-status class confirmed as currently bound. All exact source boundaries closed before execution.

final_answer: Facilities may allow contractor site work to begin. END-IRI-089 closes the action boundary by providing exact endorsement authority: Iris Installers at Site 4Q, umbrella liability coverage, CE-12 currently bound, effective before 2026-06-28. WORK-IRI-089 confirms work start date matches coverage effective date. WARN-IRI-089 is a generic warning tone, not an exact source defect. All policy requirements from STD-IRI-089-P are satisfied. No open blocker remains.
